role_justifications.conductor: Coordinates the increment-8 finale and enforces MAW gates.
role_justifications.planner: Plans the oracle-hardening and resident-defer fallback path.
role_justifications.worker: Implements bounded canary hardening, any safe extraction, and floor documentation.
role_justifications.critic: Reviews no-op resistance and validates that blind surfaces are not moved.
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: Checks delegation proof, artifacts, tests, and final verdict consistency.

orchestration: Core MAW roles are delegated to distinct sub-agents. The main session performs local edits after deterministic plan/delegation gates and records handoffs, dependency/coupling evidence, resident-defer decisions, and acceptance artifacts.
quality_bar: Never move a cluster unless a deterministic canary catches its planted no-op; if the no-op remains invisible, formally close the cluster as resident-deferred and declare the extraction floor.
deterministic_checks: dependency/coupling inventory for conditional-style-runtime and widget-content-runtime
cluster-specific planted no-op resistance probes when a deterministic canary can be constructed
acceptance_criteria: Discovery guard passes in the dashboard checkout.
Delegation proof contains distinct sub-agent ids for every selected MAW role.
Conditional-style-runtime and widget-content-runtime are either shipped only after no-op resistance is caught, or resident-deferred with artifact-backed rationale.
Resident-deferred decisions are recorded in artifacts/blind-oracle-closure.json, artifacts/extraction-floor-report.md, and artifacts/final-extraction-summary.md.
Dependency/coupling findings are recorded in artifacts/increment-8-dependency-inventory.json before any decision to move or defer.
Final extraction floor report and final-extraction-summary are updated and committed.
Final chat verdict matches artifacts/acceptance-result.json verbatim.
